dashboardSubtitle: Convert, edit, and manage files securely. Local AI & WASM inside.
dashboardSectionTitle: Smart lanes for every file workflow
dashboardSectionSubtitle: The portal stays at the center, while the grid below gives each high-value workflow a faster on-ramp.
dashboardCardAiDescription: Drop portraits, products, or logos into Zen Portal and remove the background locally with the existing on-device AI pipeline.
dashboardCardPdfDescription: Reorder pages, merge documents, and launch OCR-ready exports in a tactile local-first PDF workspace.
dashboardCardOcrDescription: Scan images or PDFs directly in the browser, then edit and copy the extracted text without touching the server.
dashboardCardMegaDropDescription: Use the central portal to push finished files into instant device-to-device delivery with QR-powered MegaDrop.
dashboardCardAudioDescription: Prepare clean transcodes, extract deliverables, and move tracks through a premium audio lane built for clarity-first output.
dashboardCardGifDescription: Turn short clips into optimized looping GIFs with a faster route for social previews, demos, and lightweight motion assets.
dashboardCardArchiveDescription: Unpack ZIP and RAR bundles, reorganize payloads, and prepare clean archive outputs without leaving the product shell.
dashboardCardWatermarkDescription: Apply consistent watermark overlays across large media sets with a dedicated batch workflow ready for production volume.
toolAudioConverterDescription: This tool shell is ready for high-fidelity transcoding, cleanup presets, and export orchestration. The visual surface is now in place for the backend pipeline.
toolVideoToGifDescription: This workspace is prepared for optimized GIF creation with trim, compression, and looping controls in the next activation step.
toolArchiveManagerDescription: This surface is ready for archive inspection, extraction, and recompression flows so ZIP and RAR operations can live inside the same product shell.
toolBatchWatermarkDescription: This tool shell is prepared for bulk watermark placement across image and video sets, with space reserved for presets and output rules.

apiSpotlight.title: API experience is being shaped into a premium control plane.
apiSpotlight.description: Upload signing, conversion jobs, auth and observability are already in the platform. This route becomes the polished developer surface while the product shell keeps the same Apple-tier visual system.

pricingSpotlight.title: Pricing is moving toward a clearer premium structure.
pricingSpotlight.description: We are packaging personal workflows, professional conversion throughput and future API access into a cleaner pricing surface without compromising the local-first product feeling.

security.intro: MegaConvert is designed to give users enterprise-grade security controls without forcing every workflow through the cloud. Our architecture blends local browser execution with hardened cloud infrastructure so file processing can stay private, resilient, and transparent.
security.hybridBody: A substantial portion of MegaConvert workflows can execute directly on the user's device via WebAssembly (WASM), browser APIs, and local AI pipelines. When a task stays local, the underlying files may never leave the device at all. This local-first model provides a practical zero-knowledge posture for supported workflows because MegaConvert has no server-side visibility into files that are processed entirely in-browser.
security.cloudBody: When server-side processing is required, files are transmitted over TLS 1.3 and stored using AES-256 encryption at rest. Access to cloud processing systems is restricted by least-privilege controls, service isolation, and operational monitoring designed to reduce unauthorized access risk.
security.deletionBody: Cloud-processed source files and generated outputs are scheduled for deletion within 1 hour after processing completes. This shortened retention window is intentionally stricter than many competing services and is designed to minimize residual storage exposure.
security.complianceBody: MegaConvert is deployed on infrastructure operated by providers that maintain internationally recognized security assurance frameworks, including ISO/IEC 27001 and SOC 2 Type II. While those attestations apply to the underlying infrastructure and not as a blanket certification of every MegaConvert feature, we align our operational practices with those controls wherever applicable.
security.accountBody: Authentication endpoints, session handling, and abuse detection controls are used to protect accounts against unauthorized access, credential misuse, automated attacks, and fraudulent activity. Users remain responsible for safeguarding their own credentials and device security.
security.disclosureBody: If you believe you have identified a vulnerability, please report it through our official support or security contact channels. We review credible reports promptly and prioritize remediation based on severity and exploitability.

privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how MegaConvert collects, uses, protects, and deletes personal information in connection with our website, browser-based tools, account system, cloud processing endpoints, and related product experiences.
privacy.regulatoryBody: MegaConvert is designed to align with major privacy regimes, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) in the European Union, the California Consumer Privacy Act and California Privacy Rights Act (CCPA/CPRA), and Brazil's Lei Geral de Protecao de Dados (LGPD), to the extent these laws apply to our operations and users.
privacy.collectBody: We may collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, account credentials, support requests, and billing or subscription metadata where applicable. We may also process limited technical information such as browser type, device diagnostics, language preference, authentication events, and service telemetry needed to maintain reliability and security.
privacy.localFirstBody: Many MegaConvert workflows run locally inside the browser using WASM and on-device AI. In those cases, the file may never be uploaded to our servers at all. If a workflow requires cloud execution, we process only the minimum file and metadata necessary to complete the requested task.
privacy.usageItem1: To authenticate users and secure accounts.
privacy.usageItem2: To deliver file conversion, editing, OCR, and collaboration workflows.
privacy.usageItem3: To detect abuse, fraud, and legal or sanctions violations.
privacy.usageItem4: To maintain uptime, quality, observability, and service performance.
privacy.usageItem5: To comply with legal obligations and enforce our agreements.
privacy.noSaleTitle: No Sale, No File Profiling, No AI Training
privacy.noSaleBody: We do not sell personal information. We do not analyze the contents of user files for advertising purposes, and we do not use user files to train general-purpose AI or machine learning models. File contents are processed only to deliver the functionality explicitly requested by the user.
privacy.sharingBody: We may share limited information with infrastructure providers, payment vendors, authentication services, analytics or observability vendors, and other processors acting on our behalf, solely as needed to operate the service, maintain security, or comply with law. We may also disclose information when legally required or when necessary to protect rights, safety, or platform integrity.
privacy.retentionBody: We retain personal information only for as long as necessary to provide the service, preserve account integrity, meet legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our terms. Where cloud file processing is used, files are subject to strict short-lived deletion windows as described in our Security page.
privacy.rightsBody: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to certain processing of your personal information. This includes the right to erasure and the right to request export of eligible account data, subject to applicable law and identity verification requirements.
privacy.securityBody: We use technical and organizational safeguards designed to protect information in transit and at rest, restrict internal access, reduce abuse risk, and preserve service integrity. No system can guarantee absolute security, but we aim to minimize data exposure through local-first architecture and short-lived cloud retention.
privacy.cookiesBody: MegaConvert uses cookies, local storage, and similar technologies for sessions, authentication, language preferences, and service analytics. For a detailed explanation, please review our Cookie Policy.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this Privacy Policy to reflect legal changes, product development, or operational needs. If we make material changes, we will update the effective date and provide additional notice where appropriate.
privacy.contactBody: Privacy-related requests, including deletion and data export requests, may be submitted through the support or contact channels made available within MegaConvert.

terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of MegaConvert, including our local-first file conversion tools, document workflows, AI-assisted features, and direct device-to-device handoff experiences.
terms.acceptanceBody: By accessing or using MegaConvert, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, you must not use the service.
terms.eligibilityBody: You must use MegaConvert only in compliance with applicable law and only if you have legal capacity to enter into these Terms. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for activity occurring under your account.
terms.permittedBody: You may use MegaConvert for lawful file processing, document editing, OCR, compression, and related workflows. You may not use the service to violate intellectual property rights, distribute unlawful content, evade security controls, or interfere with the platform or other users.
terms.localBody: Many MegaConvert features operate locally in the browser using WASM, AI models, and device-native capabilities. You remain responsible for the source files you process and for verifying the accuracy, legality, and fitness of any generated output before relying on it.
terms.sanctionsBody1: MegaConvert is subject to export control, sanctions, and trade compliance laws, including restrictions administered under OFAC frameworks, applicable European Union sanctions programs, and related local laws. The service is strictly prohibited in sanctioned or restricted jurisdictions and may not be used from, by, or for the benefit of persons located in or ordinarily resident in Russia, China, Iran, North Korea, Syria, or Cuba.
terms.sanctionsBody2: Belarus is explicitly EXEMPTED from these restrictions and service is fully available in this region. We may suspend, block, or terminate access where needed to maintain sanctions compliance, export control compliance, anti-abuse defenses, or broader legal risk management.
terms.availabilityBody: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue features at any time, including for security, maintenance, legal compliance, infrastructure migration, or product evolution. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability.
terms.disclaimersBody: MegaConvert is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, and uninterrupted service.
terms.liabilityBody: To the fullest extent permitted by law, MegaConvert and its operators will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, or punitive damages, or for any loss of data, revenue, profits, business opportunity, or goodwill arising from your use of the service. You use MegaConvert at your own risk, and the service is provided strictly on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis.
terms.terminationBody: We may suspend or terminate your access if we believe you violated these Terms, created legal or security risk, or used the service in a way that harms the platform, our partners, or other users.
terms.contactBody: Questions about these Terms may be directed through the product support channels made available in MegaConvert.

cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how MegaConvert uses cookies, local storage, and related browser technologies to provide secure access, maintain product state, and improve service reliability.
cookies.necessaryBody: Strictly necessary cookies and equivalent browser storage mechanisms are used to support authentication, session continuity, abuse prevention, CSRF protection, language preferences, and security-sensitive product behavior. These technologies are required for core product functions and cannot be disabled without affecting essential service operation.
cookies.analyticsBody: Where enabled, MegaConvert may use privacy-conscious analytics technologies to measure reliability, feature usage, conversion performance, PWA behavior, and product health. These analytics workflows may involve event telemetry pipelines, including ClickHouse-backed analytics or similar observability systems, and are used to improve stability rather than to profile the contents of user files.
cookies.localStateBody: Because MegaConvert includes local-first workflows and PWA capabilities, the application may store interface state, selected language, recent tool context, and other non-sensitive runtime preferences on the device to improve continuity across sessions.
cookies.preferencesBody: You can control cookies and local storage through your browser settings. Please note that blocking strictly necessary technologies may prevent login, session continuity, or secure operation of certain parts of the service.
cookies.changesBody: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect legal requirements, product changes, or measurement practices. Material changes will be reflected by updating the effective date above.

authCallback.defaultError: OAuth callback did not return a valid session.
